title: trifolium maritimum subsp. panormitanum
intro: Trifolium maritimum subsp. panormitanum, also known as sea clover, is a subspecies of Trifolium maritimum, a type of clover plant native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of sea clover include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Sea clover can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
